content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently chose moves matched to live reads and held timing well. Turns 2 and 4 are minimal grounding before any deeper move — earning the territory. Turn 6 tries a somatic move; when the client deflects intellectually (turn 7), the coach does NOT double down on body but pivots in turn 8 to compare the two voices — a clean read-and-pivot. When that still yields analysis (turn 9), the coach escalates in turn 10 with a paradoxical 'set both aside' move (close to paradoxical-instruction-to-resist / lets-go-there). When the client again intellectualizes (turn 11), the coach explicitly names the pattern ('moved quickly into analysis') and reframes the question away from epistemology toward identity/feeling ('how you feel about the person you'd become') — refusing to engage the intellectual puzzle, which is the central requirement here. Turn 14 catches the micro-flatness and stays with it rather than rushing — exactly the 'hold the moment after the move' criterion. The sequence respects feeling-before-action and interrupts the intellectual frame rather than feeding it. Missing: hasn't yet inverted with 'how do you not trust it' or located the value at stake, but the trajectory is clearly on-path and well-paced.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Minimal orienting question — appropriate, doesn't engage the epistemological framing yet."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with concrete content, earning ground before going deeper."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic move appropriate to interrupt the intellectual frame and move toward feeling."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Read the miss in turn 7 and pivoted laterally rather than repeating the somatic ask."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical/lets-go-there move ('set both aside') — well-timed escalation after analysis persisted."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the analysis pattern and reframes toward identity/feeling — refuses the intellectual puzzle, central to this concern."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches micro-shift ('what got flat') and holds the moment instead of filling — excellent timing."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["how-do-you-not-trust-it", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "the-happiness-filter"],
  "notes": "Strong move-to-read matching and pivoting throughout. The conversation is mid-arc, so some territory items aren't yet reached, but the path is sound."
}
